items.title: Judge told Maduro 'plundered' Venezuelan wealth in court battle over legal fees
items.dek: A judge said the right to defence was paramount as prosecutors argued the couple should not be able to use Venezuelan funds to pay their lawyers.
items.body: A judge said the right to defence was paramount as prosecutors argued the couple should not be able to use Venezuelan funds to pay their lawyers.

items.title: Rationing power and diluting petrol - how African countries are coping with effects of Iran war
items.dek: The disruption in oil supplies has caused shortages and concerns in several African countries.
items.body: The disruption in oil supplies has caused shortages and concerns in several African countries.
items.author: IriLine Desk
